name: coelho-landing
description: Landing page premium para e-commerce de calzado Coelho

scripts.build: npm run minify-css && npm run minify-js
scripts.minify-css: cssnano css/styles.css css/styles.min.css && cssnano css/animations.css css/animations.min.css
scripts.minify-js: terser js/main.js -o js/main.min.js && terser js/animations.js -o js/animations.min.js && terser js/cart.js -o js/cart.min.js

author: Thom
